name: Delete eco news by id with invalid or restricted access -- @1.2
fullName: Delete Eco News: Delete eco news by id with invalid or restricted access

steps.name: Given I am an authorized user
When I send request to delete eco news with id "32"
Then the response status code should be 400
And the response message get/delete request should be "Current user has no permission for this action"

parameters.name: message
parameters.value: Current user has no permission for this action

parameterValues: Current user has no permission for this action
